personalInfo.name: Chanchai Tasujai
personalInfo.title: Senior Quality Assurance Engineer

skills.category: AI-Assisted Development — building and shipping real products with AI pair programming (Claude Code, Gemini); strong at system overview, choosing the right stack, and verifying output quality
items: Web: React, Next.js, Astro, Node.js, Tailwind CSS
Mobile: Flutter/Dart, Kotlin Multiplatform, Google Play Console (Release Signing, IAP, Closed Testing)
Backend & Cloud: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS, Edge Functions), Cloudflare (Workers, D1, KV), SQL, Vercel

roles.title: Senior QA
description: Own software quality across 3 concurrent projects: LION (Sales Portal), ATP30 (driver data and billing), and Tokio Marine (insurance policy issuance for the Shopee platform, plus an App Modernization project migrating the Premium Queue Process to Azure)
Owned test strategy and regression quality gates for critical modules.
Applied AI to analyze and resolve user issues on the ATP30 project.
Delivered customer training sessions on the LION project.
Ran performance/load testing of the Partner API with K6, including test result reporting
Designed penetration test cases and executed E2E testing of the policy issuance system
Tested legacy-to-cloud data migration, validating document output (StreamServe) against the legacy system
achievements: Reduced regression testing time by 40% using Robot Framework automation.
Lowered production defect leakage with risk-based testing and stronger test traceability.

roles.title: Project Manager
description: Oversaw the company's entire project portfolio across clients: ATP30, Tokio Marine, LION, and CHICCARRENT.
Led ATP30 project delivery from scope planning through UAT milestones.
Aligned business, client, and engineering teams to reduce requirement gaps.
achievements: Delivered UAT milestone on schedule under constrained team capacity.
leadership: Drove Agile ceremonies (Sprint Planning, Daily Stand-up, Retrospective) for execution consistency.

roles.title: Software Tester (QA)
description: Designed and wrote test cases, and tested the system before each customer delivery on the LION project.
Ran UAT with the client and demoed the system for sprint-based deliveries.
Handled quality assurance across manual and automated testing flows, including API contract testing with Postman.
Tested an enterprise Transport Management System (TMS) with clients such as LION.

roles.title: Software Tester
description: Designed test cases and executed manual/functional testing across web and mobile platforms.
Deployed the web app and mobile apps (iOS and Android) to production.
Analyzed requirements, designed system architecture, and supported server and database reliability.
Managed bug lifecycle and root cause analysis.
Coordinated with an outsourced development team.
Designed UI screens in Figma for both mobile and web, based on features and user requirements.
achievements: Expanded test coverage in critical modules and reduced repeated post-release defects.
Improved bug reporting workflow, reducing turnaround and re-test cycles.

roles.title: Computer Teacher
description: Taught vocational students in the computer curriculum.
Prepared lesson plans and teaching materials aligned with current technology.
Managed the college's Facebook Page — created content and published announcements.

roles.title: Software Quality Assurance Engineer
description: Mentored junior QA team members and managed QA resources across projects.
Wrote test cases and tested the AIS client's projects — both the web application and the myAIS mobile app.
Ran UAT with the client each sprint for milestone deliveries.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: A personal portfolio website designed and built from scratch, supporting dual languages (Thai/English) with smooth animations and full responsiveness across all devices.

problem: Needed a professional platform to showcase work and experience beyond a static PDF CV.
PDF resumes cannot display interactive content or be updated in real-time.
Wanted to demonstrate Full-Stack development skills through a real-world project.
solution: Built a SPA with React + Vite, implementing i18n (Thai/English).
Used Framer Motion for scroll animations and a 3D tilt effect on the profile image.
Deployed on Vercel with Analytics and a live visitor counter.
impact: A living portfolio that can be updated anytime without sending a new CV.
Demonstrates Frontend development skills through a live product.
Reaches both Thai and international audiences via bilingual support.
architecture: React SPA → Vite build → Vercel CDN
shadcn/ui components + Tailwind CSS design system

features.title: Core Features
items: 3D tilt effect on profile image via Framer Motion
Responsive design across all device sizes

features.title: Sections
items: Hero — name, contact info, social links

portfolio.title: Transport Management System (ShipManager)
portfolio.description: A logistics operation platform for Suchada 2019 that combines AI OCR, LINE Bot workflows, and actionable dashboards to reduce manual work and improve data quality.

problem: Manual data entry from receipts and slips caused frequent human errors.
Historical document retrieval was slow and inconsistent.
Cost summary per trip was delayed, slowing operational decisions.
solution: Implemented Gemini-powered OCR to extract and validate data before saving to Supabase.
Enabled field teams to upload receipts directly through LINE Bot.
Built dashboard and Excel reporting flow for finance and management visibility.
impact: Significantly reduced repetitive daily paperwork across operations.
Reduced manual entry mistakes in expense and fuel records.
Improved speed of management reporting for transport profitability review.
architecture: Dashboard/Excel Export -> Operational and management reporting

features.title: Core Modules
items: Transport Logging - Manage standard and weight-based transport jobs
Expense Tracking - Track driver expenses and withdrawals
Fuel Logging - Record refueling and calculate costs
Driver Management - Driver profiles and income
Vehicle Management - Vehicle registration and metadata
OCR System - AI extraction from shipping/fuel/expense documents

features.title: Key Features
items: AI OCR for transfer slips, fuel receipts, and shipping forms
LINE Bot integration for real-time field uploads
Support for standard and weight-based transport calculation
Excel export for operations and accounting workflows
Responsive UI for desktop and mobile users

portfolio.title: Castiny — cast web videos to Chromecast / Android TV
portfolio.description: Android app that casts video links (HLS, MP4, DASH, YouTube, X) to the TV — built end-to-end from code to Play Store release. Cast device discovery over mDNS, a stream sniffer that auto-detects video URLs, full monetization (In-App Purchase + AdMob) backed by 40+ unit tests, and a Kotlin Multiplatform rewrite targeting Android/iOS from a single codebase.

portfolio.title: Runboard — macOS app for managing local projects
portfolio.description: Desktop dashboard for starting, stopping, and inspecting multiple local npm projects from one place — auto-scans for projects, streams live logs, links detected localhost URLs, and switches git branches from the UI.

portfolio.title: QA Test Toolkit — Tokio Marine (Internal)
portfolio.description: A set of tools built to speed up the team's testing work: a Payload Randomizer for generating UAT test data, a UAT Demo Runbook for client demos, K6 performance test scripts with result reporting, and a system documentation website.

portfolio.title: Project Knowledge Base & User Manual (Internal)
portfolio.description: A documentation hub that gathers each project's business logic, workflows, architecture, API specs, and user manuals in one place — with an embedded Admin UI that calls real APIs to manage master data and test endpoints directly from the docs. The single source of truth used daily by Dev, QA, BA, and Support teams.

portfolio.title: ATP30 Auto Verify Tool (Internal)
portfolio.description: A web app that automatically verifies billing calculation results against the legacy system's logic — cutting manual verification time and helping the team catch discrepancies faster.

portfolio.title: Zeabix Bot — Internal Company Chatbot
portfolio.description: A full-stack chatbot connecting Supabase with Gemini AI, with a management dashboard and a Slack webhook integration for internal company use.

stats.title: In Numbers
stats.subtitle: Skills and results accumulated throughout my career
aboutMe.paragraph1: Hi, I'm Ae. Born and raised in Lamphun, and I still call it home today. My story started simply — I loved playing games as a kid, and somewhere along the way I got curious about how computers actually work. That curiosity led me into the world of technology, and I've been here ever since.
aboutMe.paragraph2: Along the way I've tried on a few different hats — computer teacher, Software QA, and project manager. Each role taught me something different, but they all revolved around the thing I love: technology.
aboutMe.paragraph3: These days I still enjoy learning something new every day, especially AI, which is changing the way we all work.
aboutMe.highlight1.title: Diverse Background
aboutMe.highlight1.desc: Teacher -> QA -> PM -> Dev. A unique blend of skills.
aboutMe.highlight2.title: Full-Stack Capable
aboutMe.highlight2.desc: Proficient in both Frontend (React) and Backend (Node/Supabase).
aboutMe.highlight3.title: Fast Learner
aboutMe.highlight3.desc: Adapting quickly to new tools like AI, Cloud, and Frameworks.
aboutMe.highlight4.title: Quality First
aboutMe.highlight4.desc: Deeply rooted testing mindset ensures robust and bug-free code.
